potential_missing.source_sentence: The objective is to provide an online platform through which museums and art galleries can make use-off to exhibit their collections in times of unavailable street galleries.

The main features provided for the admin are that they will be able to update, add, delete, input price, description and information about an art (stock availability), generate report of gallery and that for the customers are that they will be able to order (Payment), delete order, view end-user projected art particulars .

The system shall enable admin users to generate reports on gallery activities.
The system shall enable customers to delete their orders.

missing_requirements.evidence_quote: The objective is to provide an online platform through which museums and art galleries can make use-off to exhibit their collections in times of unavailable street galleries.
missing_requirements.suggested_requirement: The system shall allow museums and art galleries to exhibit their collections remotely.

missing_requirements.evidence_quote: Like in times of pandemic also people need not bother not going to a museum or art gallery instead they can have online art shopping and art exhibits.
missing_requirements.suggested_requirement: The system shall be accessible during pandemics and other situations where physical galleries are unavailable.

missing_requirements.evidence_quote: There will be two types of users accessing the system: Admin (Creators/authority of the art displayed) and Customer (One who looks to buy the art).
missing_requirements.suggested_requirement: The system shall have two user roles: Admin and Customer, with different permissions and functionalities.

missing_requirements.evidence_quote: The main features provided for the admin are that they will be able to update, add, delete, input price, description and information about an art (stock availability), generate report of gallery and that for the customers are that they will be able to order (Payment), delete order, view end-user projected art particulars (Figures 34.1–34.8).
missing_requirements.suggested_requirement: The system shall have features for admin users to manage art pieces, including updating, adding, deleting, and generating reports, as well as features for customers to place orders, delete orders, and view art details.

hallucinations.rewritten_requirement: The system shall provide an online platform for managing the buying and selling of artistic creations.
hallucinations.reason: This requirement is too broad and does not specify any specific features or functionalities.

hallucinations.rewritten_requirement: The system shall allow users to view art pieces along with their descriptions, prices, and other relevant information.
hallucinations.reason: This requirement is too vague and does not specify what 'other relevant information' means.

duplicates.requirement_b: The system shall allow customers to place orders for art pieces, including payment options.
duplicates.reason: These two requirements are similar and can be combined into a single requirement.

ambiguities.rewritten_requirement: The system shall allow customers to view details of art pieces.
ambiguities.reason: This requirement is too vague and does not specify what 'details' means.

Source text:
<<<
To provide an online platform to manage the buying, selling and storage of artistic creations provided by creators/other platforms or auctions and to organize events to exhibit these products. The
system is a gallery having art pieces with its description, price and other information and the order
activity, payment activity, order update activity and so on. The objective is to provide an online platform through which museums and art galleries can make use-off to exhibit their collections in times
of unavailable street galleries. Like in times of pandemic also people need not bother not going to a
museum or art gallery instead they can have online art shopping and art exhibits. The system should
be immune to any chances of misuse and unauthorized reproduction of works of arts and designs.
There will be two types of users accessing the system: Admin (Creators/authority of the art displayed)
and Customer (One who looks to buy the art). The main features provided for the admin are that
they will be able to update, add, delete, input price, description and information about an art (stock
availability), generate report of gallery and that for the customers are that they will be able to order
(Payment), delete order, view end-user projected art particulars (Figures 34.1–34.8).
>>>

{

    "The system shall allow admin users to update the information of art pieces, including prices, descriptions, and stock availability.",
    "The system shall enable admin users to generate reports on gallery activities.",
    "The system shall allow customers to place orders for art pieces, including payment options.",
    "The system shall enable customers to delete their orders.",
    "The system shall allow customers to view details of art pieces."
  ]
}
